selections.name: Putinacall
selections.reason: Won on debut at this track and distance. Drawn well and looks hard to beat again.

selections.name: What A Scandal
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Putinacall last start. Meets similar conditions and is the main danger.

selections.name: Tricia's Rainbow
selections.reason: Won on debut here. Forgive the last start in a tougher race; can bounce back.

selections.name: Cool Zumbelina
selections.reason: First starter from a leading yard with solid trial form. Watch betting.

danger_horse.name: What A Scandal
danger_horse.reason: Only missed by a nose against the top pick last time out.

selections.name: Head Kahuna
selections.reason: Consistent form with consecutive placings. Gets a great draw to sit on the pace.

selections.name: Waveton
selections.reason: Solid second on debut before a forgivable run on a slow track. Can improve.

selections.name: Capital Design
selections.reason: Has placed in multiple starts and draws well to be competitive.

selections.name: Northern Eagle
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but has shown ability in the past. Keep safe.

danger_horse.name: Waveton
danger_horse.reason: Showed enough on debut to suggest she can challenge in this maiden.

selections.name: Fortheo
selections.reason: Knocking on the door with recent placings. Ready to break through.

selections.name: Fined For Speeding
selections.reason: Racing well recently and gets the inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Grande Diablo
selections.reason: Improved second-up run. Wide gate is a slight concern but has claims.

selections.name: Flee With Me
selections.reason: Capable of a big finish and gets weight relief. Value chance.

danger_horse.name: Fined For Speeding
danger_horse.reason: Has been finishing strongly and the rail draw is a big advantage.

selections.name: Nirmata
selections.reason: Won well at this track and distance last start. Looks to have returned in great shape.

selections.name: Zampano
selections.reason: Forgive the last run; won well prior. Well-placed and saves his best for his home track.

selections.name: Echelon
selections.reason: Consistent form and gets a handy 9lbs claim. Major player.

selections.name: Redline
selections.reason: Coming off a win and draws well. Can feature in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Zampano
danger_horse.reason: Drops in class and loves this track. Big threat.

selections.name: King Kikau
selections.reason: Won at this track and distance last start. Going well and can repeat.

selections.name: Visualise
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by King Kikau last time. Meets him again and is a strong chance.

selections.name: Grandini
selections.reason: Won last start and is in excellent form. Confidence is high.

selections.name: Warrior For Peace
selections.reason: Forgive the last run in a tougher race. Can bounce back here.

danger_horse.name: Visualise
danger_horse.reason: Only missed by half a length last start and has a great record at the distance.

selections.name: Chandon Star
selections.reason: Impressive win last start. Multiple winner over this track and trip.

selections.name: Pride To Follow
selections.reason: Runner-up to Chandon Star last time. Ready to peak fourth-up.

selections.name: Ollie's Secret
selections.reason: Won nicely last start on a wet track. Back in form and can go on with it.

selections.name: Yiska
selections.reason: Classy gelding resuming. Has trialed well and can surprise fresh.

danger_horse.name: Pride To Follow
danger_horse.reason: Getting closer to a win and meets the top pick slightly better at the weights.

selections.name: Navajo Peak
selections.reason: Class runner of the field resuming. Group 1 placed and has the quality to win this.

selections.name: Lord Of Biscay
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a strong win. Hard to stop in this rich vein of form.

selections.name: Formal Display
selections.reason: Won nicely last start. Progressive type who ticks plenty of boxes.

selections.name: Hulu
selections.reason: Won at this track last start. Up in class but has winning momentum.

danger_horse.name: Lord Of Biscay
danger_horse.reason: In peak form and has the fitness edge over the resuming top weight.

selections.name: Whittello Sun
selections.reason: Won well last start. Mitchell Bell takes the ride. Stays in the mix despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Dunquin
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and won last start. Looks a stern test for this field.

selections.name: Jason Darren
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start. Due for a change of luck and draws well.

selections.name: Yanabah
selections.reason: Set the pace and finished second last time. Blinkers go on.

danger_horse.name: Dunquin
danger_horse.reason: Coming off a strong win and has upside.
